name: GT-bhsa-jc
source: HOS, refs/hos/joa-m.md:2300 (3.1.2), VERBATIM: "Let H be a complex Hilbert space and B(H) the algebra of all bounded linear operators on H. Let  $B(H)_{\rm sa}$  denote the special Jordan algebra of all self-adjoint operators in B(H) equipped with the operator norm. By a JC algebra we shall mean any norm-closed Jordan subalgebra of  $B(H)_{\rm sa}$ ." Applied to A=B(H): V=B(H)_sa with a o b=(ab+ba)/2 is a (unital) JC algebra.
